_comment: Phantom classes still shipping — classes a ds-react wrapper emits that the DS
never defined, so the component renders unstyled in every consumer.
22 of the original 24 were fixed in ds-react 1.10 by correcting the
wrappers (the backward-compat law forbids renaming published CSS).
The two below are NOT wrapper drift: SiteHeader groups mobile nav into titled
sections, a real feature with a test, and nav.css simply has no class for it.
Fixing them means ADDING two DS classes, which is an owner decision under
CONTROLLED MODE - not something a wrapper edit can resolve.
This list may only ever SHRINK: mount-all.test.tsx fails on any new entry.
Kept as data, not TS literals, so the ds-no-phantom-classes hook does not
fire on the very list that tracks them.
